channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Man sentenced in cold case murders solved with chewing gum
item.description: Convicted killer Mitchell Gaff received a 50-years-to-life sentence for the murders of two women in the 1980s.

item.title: Bipartisan U.S.-Mexico congressional caucus launches amid diplomatic strain
item.description: The launch is backed by the American Mexican Leadership Council, a new national group also debuting Thursday to highlight Mexican American...

item.title: Some parents oppose tech in schools, but districts push back
item.description: Parents concerned about screen time are urging schools to return to traditional methods like pencils and paper.

item.title: Border Patrol chief Michael Banks steps down
item.description: Michael Banks, the head of U.S. Border Patrol, is resigning from his position.
